subject: One more free gift…
body:
Your free gifts in one place

I wanted to just tell you what an honor it's been to work on this project for you.

Two years of work, millions of dollars invested to make a tool that could help entrepreneurs build businesses as flexible as their imaginations.

There are 3 days left to grab all the free stuff at skool.com/hormozi

You'll get 90 days free + a 10x cheaper lifetime lower rate of $9/mo.

And I already loaded it up with:

- Money Models Training Course
- Money Models Audiobook

PLUS one more free gift I didn't tell you about on the webinar...

- Skool Exclusive: Money Models tech training how to turn the money models into reality.

I think you're gonna love it.

NOTE: Of course, you can always get access to the audiobook on my podcast and the training course on my site for free. No optin or trial required.

Use them well,

Alex
